title: Submerged Snell Ocean
description: A permanently submerged WebGPU ocean inspection scene with three directional spectral cascades, the wave underside's Snell window and total internal reflection, above-water structure reprojection, aquatic perspective, live differential-area caustics, full-resolution god rays, suspended particulates, and a seabed-rooted tower inside a horizon-closing saucer floor.
backend: WebGPU / TSL compute, node materials, and render pipeline
techniques: three 256 squared directional JONSWAP and TMA wave cascades
packed workgroup inverse FFT with explicit barriers
surface-anchored Snell refraction with exact water-to-air Fresnel
total internal reflection outside the critical angle
per-channel aquatic extinction and directional in-scatter
differential-area caustics shared by surfaces and god rays
flat central seabed rising to a safely submerged far saucer rim
AgX output with a generated 32-cube grade
